use_cases: Display brand identity in hero sections with animated visual interest
Serve as a loading or loading-state visual indicator
Enhance product landing pages with dynamic motion graphics
Create memorable splash screens for applications
Add ambient motion to marketing websites without user interaction
ai_summary: A dynamic spinning arc logo featuring multiple concentric arcs rotating at different speeds and delays, creating a layered hypnotic effect. The component uses CSS animations with staggered timing to achieve continuous rotation, suitable for brand display in hero sections, loading states, or as a visual anchor on marketing pages.
